creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text: It's about soundtrack, Native MIDI depends on Timidity, which is no longer required dependency for a sdl(2)mixer, and I couldn't build sdl2mixer with fluidsynth here. OPL2/3 is emulated and indeed works as before, maybe just a different pkg-message is in order, as we also have a new place for a configuration files.
